name: 阿比斯的宝藏 - Treasure of abyss
short_description: 《阿比斯的宝藏》是一款超长篇的海贼冒险剧情式RPG游戏，并结合半沙盒与半硬核的传统玩法。游戏背景与故事建立在拥有大面积海洋的幻想世界，海洋将各个岛屿连接起来，海路也成为了游戏唯一的交通方法。四大海域成为了海贼们冒险与战斗的舞台，进行着各种各样精彩演绎。
detailed_description:
[The strongest sea articles released]

The North Sea is a sea of pirates. Here you can see the pirate ships of various forces at any time. You can compete with them. Only the strongest of the pirates can survive here.

Conquer the forces of Pirates and restore the kingdom that once fell!

The mark of Abis finally got together, and the door of Abis was about to open!

New plots, new bosses, new challenges start here!
